{{Quote|Whoever created these must have been part machine. They didn't program anything like taste or flavor into them.|Leia Organa|<ref name="SME" />}}
'''Emergency cube concentrates''' were small<ref name="SME" /> dehydrated edible cubes containing nutrient concentrates.<ref name="GSWU">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''</ref> They were [[Color/Legends|colored]] pink and blue, had no flavor, and were used in emergency situations by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives. Having crashed on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] survived on emergency cube concentrates until they came upon an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony.<ref name="SME" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
